de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class AbstractWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionNodeWriter, SymbolicLayoutWriter

    public abstract class AbstractWriter
extends Object
    Provides the basic functionality for classes like ExecutionNodeWriter and SymbolicLayoutWriter which encodes an object structure as XML.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String ATTRIBUTE_ENCODING
      Attribute name to store encodings.
      static String ATTRIBUTE_XML_ID
      Attribute name to store the XML ID.
      static String DEFAULT_ENCODING
      The default enconding.
      static String LEADING_WHITE_SPACE_PER_LEVEL
      The used leading white space in each level.
      static String NEW_LINE
      New line.

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected void appendAttribute(String attributeName, String value, StringBuffer sb)
      Adds an XML attribute to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendEmptyTag(int level, String tagName, Map<String,String> attributeValues, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends an empty tag to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendEndTag(int level, String tagName, StringBuffer sb)
      Appends an end tag to the given StringBuffer.

      Adds a line break to the given StringBuffer.

      Appends a start tag to the given StringBuffer.
      protected void appendWhiteSpace(int level, StringBuffer sb)
      Adds leading white space to the StringBuffer.
      protected void appendXmlHeader(String encoding, StringBuffer sb)
      Adds an XML header to the given StringBuffer.

      • appendEmptyTag

        protected void appendEmptyTag(int level,
                  String tagName,
                  Map<String,String> attributeValues,
                  StringBuffer sb)
        Appends an empty tag to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level.
        tagName - The tag name.
        attributeValues - The attributes.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

      • appendStartTag

        protected void appendStartTag(int level,
                  String tagName,
                  Map<String,String> attributeValues,
                  StringBuffer sb)

        Parameters:
        level - The level.
        tagName - The tag name.
        attributeValues - The attributes.
        sb - The StringBuffer to append to.

        Appends an end tag to the given StringBuffer.

        tagName - The tag name.

      • appendWhiteSpace

        protected void appendWhiteSpace(int level,
                    StringBuffer sb)
        Adds leading white space to the StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        level - The level in the tree used for leading white space (formating).
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

      • appendAttribute

        protected void appendAttribute(String attributeName,
                   String value,
                   StringBuffer sb)
        Adds an XML attribute to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        attributeName - The attribute name.
        value - The attribute value.
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

      • appendXmlHeader

        protected void appendXmlHeader(String encoding,
                   StringBuffer sb)
        Adds an XML header to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        encoding - The encoding to use.
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.

        protected void appendNewLine(StringBuffer sb)
        Adds a line break to the given StringBuffer.
        Parameters:
        sb - The StringBuffer to write to.
